hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path'); case "$FILE" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.astro) npx eslint --fix "$FILE" --quiet ;; esac

FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path'); F=${FILE//\\//}; case "$F" in */src/lib/services/*.ts|*/src/lib/services/*.tsx) npx vitest related "$FILE" --run --exclude '**/jobs.rls.test.ts' || exit 2 ;; esac
